label: Accent Colour
desc: Sets the primary interactive colour — buttons, active states, focus rings, and highlights throughout the app.

label: High Contrast
desc: Increase border and text contrast for better visibility.

label: Calibration Complete
desc: All {n} iterations completed successfully. Labels have been saved for each action phase.

label: Eyes Open / Closed
desc: Classic baseline: resting eyes-open vs eyes-closed. Best for beginners & first calibration.

label: Short Attention
desc: Shorter phases (10 s) for children or users with limited focus endurance.

label: Clinical / Research
desc: Extended 5-iteration protocol with long action phases for research or clinical baseline.

label: Focus / Relax
desc: Neurofeedback: mental arithmetic vs. calm breathing. General use.

label: Gaming / Performance
desc: High-demand task vs. passive rest. For esports and peak-performance biofeedback.

label: Meditation
desc: Active thinking vs. mindfulness meditation. For meditators & practitioners.

label: Pre-sleep / Drowsiness
desc: Alert wakefulness vs. drowsiness. For sleep research & wind-down tracking.

label: Stress / Anxiety
desc: Resting calm vs. mild cognitive stressor. For anxiety and stress-response tracking.

label: Quick Presets
desc: Select a calibration configuration based on your goal, age, and use case. Settings can still be adjusted below.

label: Re-embed All Labels
desc: Recompute embeddings for all existing labels using the current model. Run this after switching models.

label: Channels
desc: Number of EEG electrodes to simulate.

label: Line noise
desc: Add 50 Hz or 60 Hz mains interference.

label: Signal Preview
desc: Live preview of the first 4 channels.

label: Signal Quality
desc: Adjust signal-to-noise ratio. Higher = cleaner signal.

label: Sample Rate (Hz)
desc: Samples per second per channel.

label: Signal Template
desc: Choose the type of synthetic signal to generate.

label: Bad quality EEG
desc: Noisy signal with muscle artefacts, 50/60 Hz line noise, and electrode pops.

label: From file
desc: Replay samples from a CSV or EDF file.

label: Good quality EEG
desc: Realistic resting-state EEG with dominant alpha rhythm and pink noise background.

label: Intermittent connection
desc: Good signal with periodic dropouts simulating loose electrodes or wireless interference.

label: Sine waves
desc: Clean sine waves at standard frequency bands (delta, theta, alpha, beta, gamma).

label: Sustained duration
desc: Seconds focus must remain above the threshold before DND activates.

label: Enable auto-DND
desc: When on, the app activates macOS Do Not Disturb once engagement stays high for the configured time. DND is cleared as soon as engagement drops.

label: DND Exit Delay
desc: How long your focus score must stay below the threshold before DND is cleared. Prevents brief dips from toggling DND off.

label: Exit notification
desc: Send a notification when focus mode is automatically deactivated (score dropped, low signal quality, or feature turned off).

label: Focus Lookback
desc: If focus was sustained within this window before the score dropped, the exit countdown resets — recent focus delays DND deactivation.

label: Focus mode
desc: The macOS Focus mode to activate when your engagement is sustained. Pick from modes configured in System Settings → Focus.

label: SNR exit threshold
desc: If signal-to-noise ratio stays below this level for 1 minute, focus mode is forcibly deactivated. Lower values tolerate noisier signals.

label: Focus threshold
desc: Minimum engagement score (0–100) required. The score is derived from your EEG beta/(alpha+theta) ratio.

label: Auto-start on launch
desc: Automatically load the active model when the app starts.

label: Enable LLM server
desc: Run an OpenAI-compatible inference server on the same port as the WebSocket API. Requires the llm Cargo feature and a downloaded model.

label: API key (optional)
desc: Require this Bearer token on every /v1/* request. Leave empty for open access.

label: TurboQuant attention rotation
desc: Hadamard rotation applied to Q/K/V tensors before KV-cache write (llama.cpp PR #21038). Significantly improves quality of quantized KV caches at near-zero cost. Keep enabled unless you hit model compatibility issues.

label: Context size
desc: KV-cache size in tokens. Auto picks the largest context that fits your GPU/RAM.

label: Flash attention
desc: Use flash attention for faster, more memory-efficient self-attention. Supported on Metal, CUDA, and Vulkan backends. Disable only if you experience compatibility issues.

label: GPU layers
desc: Layers to offload to GPU (0 = CPU only, high = GPU). Requires llm-metal / llm-cuda feature.

label: GPU memory safety
desc: Minimum free GPU/unified memory required before running inference. Prevents Metal/CUDA crashes when memory is low. Set to Off to disable (not recommended).

label: KV-cache quantization (TurboQuant)
desc: Storage precision for the KV-cache tensors. Quantized types (Q8_0/Q5_0/Q4_0) cut VRAM use significantly. TurboQuant attention rotation (below) keeps quality high when quantized.

label: Offload KQV to GPU
desc: Offload K/Q/V tensor operations to the GPU even when not all transformer layers are GPU-offloaded. Recommended for hybrid CPU+GPU setups.

label: Max concurrent requests
desc: Serialises decode loops while keeping HTTP connections responsive.

label: Prefill batch size
desc: Controls how many tokens are processed per decode call during prompt ingestion. Larger values speed up prefill at the cost of peak memory. Auto uses min(n_ctx, 4096).

label: Auto-load vision encoder
desc: Automatically load the best available vision projector (mmproj) when the server starts.

label: Encoder threads
desc: CPU threads for the vision/audio encoder.

label: Brave Search API key
desc: Free tier: 2,000 queries/month. Get a key at brave.com/search/api

label: Context compression
desc: Compress tool results to save context window space. Recommended for small models (< 8 K context). Helps the model complete multi-step tool chains (e.g. search then fetch).

label: Edit file
desc: Allow surgical find-and-replace edits to existing files.

label: Location
desc: Allow approximate IP-based country, region, city, and timezone lookup.

label: Max calls per round
desc: How many tools the model may invoke in a single round.

label: Max rounds
desc: How many think→tool→think hops the model may perform per message.

label: Read file
desc: Allow reading text files. Large files are paginated with offset/limit.

label: Base delay
desc: Initial delay in milliseconds before the first retry. Doubles with each attempt.

label: Max retries
desc: Number of retry attempts after the initial failure. 0 = no retries.

label: Network retry
desc: Retry web tools (search, fetch, location) on transient errors with exponential backoff.

label: Search provider
desc: Choose a web search backend. Brave Search requires a free API key. SearXNG requires a self-hosted instance URL.

label: SearXNG instance URL
desc: Base URL of your self-hosted SearXNG instance.

label: Skill API
desc: Allow the LLM to query the NeuroSkill API — device status, EEG sessions, labels, search, hooks, calibrations, TTS, and more.

label: Skills auto-refresh
desc: Periodically download the latest community skills from GitHub. Set to 0 to disable.

label: Agent Skills
desc: Skills provide specialised instructions the LLM can load on demand. Toggle individual skills to control which are available in chat.

label: Sync on launch
desc: Always fetch the latest skills when the app starts

label: Teach NeuroSkill something new
desc: Suggest a skill on Discord — from protocols to automations, anything goes.

label: Web cache
desc: Cache web search and fetch results on disk to avoid redundant network calls.

label: Web fetch
desc: Allow fetching the raw text body of a public HTTP(S) page.

label: Web search
desc: Search the web using the configured search provider.

label: Write file
desc: Allow creating or overwriting files. Parent directories are created automatically.

label: Verbose LLM logging
desc: Show raw llama.cpp / clip_model_loader output in the log. Off by default — only enable when debugging model loading.

label: Auto-Connect
desc: Automatically scan for LSL streams every 10 s and connect to paired sources when found. The session starts immediately — no manual action needed.

label: Idle Timeout
desc: Stop the session automatically when no samples arrive for this long. Useful when the LSL source crashes or is paused without disconnecting.

label: Local LSL Streams
desc: Discover EEG/EXG streams broadcast via Lab Streaming Layer on your local network. Any LSL-compatible device (OpenBCI, BrainFlow, Emotiv via BrainFlow, MATLAB, Python pylsl, etc.) can be used as a data source.

label: Accessibility
desc: Keyboard and mouse activity tracking uses a CGEventTap (macOS) to record timestamps of the last key press and mouse event. No keystrokes or cursor positions are stored — only Unix-second timestamps. This requires Accessibility permission on macOS.

label: Bluetooth
desc: Bluetooth is used to connect to your BCI headset (Muse, MW75 Neuro, OpenBCI Ganglion, IDUN Guardian, etc.). On macOS, the system will prompt for Bluetooth access the first time the app scans. On Linux and Windows no separate permission is needed.

label: Calendar
desc: Calendar tools can read events for scheduling context. Permission is requested by macOS when needed.

label: Full Disk Access
desc: Required for direct Focus-mode detection via the system database. Without it, the app falls back to a slower legacy method. Recommended for reliable Do Not Disturb integration.

label: Location Services
desc: On macOS, Location Services uses CoreLocation (GPS / Wi-Fi / cell) for high-accuracy positioning. On Linux and Windows the app uses IP-based geolocation which needs no permission. If Location Services is denied or unavailable, the app falls back to IP geolocation automatically.

label: Notifications
desc: Notifications are used to alert you when you reach your daily recording goal, and when a software update is available. On macOS and Windows, the OS will prompt for permission the first time a notification is sent.

label: Screen Recording
desc: Required to capture other application windows for the screenshot embedding system. macOS redacts window content without this permission.

label: Accessibility
desc: To timestamp keyboard and mouse events for activity context. Only the time of the event is stored — never what was typed or where the cursor was.

label: Bluetooth
desc: To discover and stream data from your BCI headset over BLE.

label: Calendar
desc: To provide scheduling context to the LLM tools so the AI can reference your upcoming events.

label: Location
desc: To provide precise location context to the LLM and store GPS fixes alongside health data. Falls back to IP geolocation if denied.

label: Notifications
desc: To notify you when you hit your daily recording goal and when updates are ready.

label: Screen Recording
desc: To capture the active window for visual-similarity search and cross-modal EEG correlation. Only opt-in screenshots are stored — never continuous recording.

label: Embedding Model
desc: Vision model used to generate image embeddings for similarity search.

label: GPU Acceleration
desc: Use GPU for image embeddings and OCR. Disable to force CPU inference (frees GPU for LLM/EEG).

label: Image Size
desc: Intermediate resolution (px). Captured window is resized to fit this square before saving and embedding.

label: Capture Interval
desc: Aligned with EEG embedding epochs (5 s each). 1× = every epoch, 2× = every other epoch, up to 12× (60 s).

label: Embedding model changed
desc: screenshots were embedded with a different model. Re-embed for consistent search results.

label: OCR Text Extraction
desc: Extract text from screenshots for text-based search. Runs on full-resolution image before downsizing.

label: WebP Quality
desc: WebP compression quality (0–100). Lower = smaller files.

label: Re-embed Screenshots
desc: Recompute embeddings for all existing screenshots using the current model.

label: Action Labels
desc: Names shown during each phase and stored as EEG labels.

label: Track Active Window
desc: Record which app and window is in focus. Stored locally in activity.sqlite, never uploaded.

label: API Authentication
desc: When set, all HTTP and WebSocket API requests must include this token in the Authorization header. Leave empty to disable authentication.

label: Auto-fit dashboard height
desc: Expands or contracts the main window to match dashboard content, clamped to screen height.

label: Daily Goal
desc: Set your daily recording goal. Progress is shown on the dashboard.

label: Data Directory
desc: Where all EEG data, embeddings, labels, and logs are stored.

label: Font Size
desc: Adjust the UI text size. Affects all text in the app.

label: Location Services
desc: Enable location services to provide geographic context for sessions and LLM tools. On macOS this uses CoreLocation (GPS/Wi-Fi) for high accuracy; on other platforms it uses IP geolocation. Disabled by default — toggle on to request permission and test.

label: HuggingFace Endpoint
desc: Optional mirror/base URL for model downloads (LLM + EXG + TTS). Default follows HF_ENDPOINT or https://huggingface.co.

label: Inference Device
desc: Where AI inference runs. GPU is faster; CPU works on any machine and avoids VRAM pressure. Restart the LLM server after changing.

label: Track Keyboard & Mouse Activity
desc: Record when keyboard and mouse are used, by second. No special OS permissions required. Stored locally in activity.sqlite.

label: Iterations
desc: Number of full Action 1 → Break → Action 2 → Break cycles.

label: Language
desc: Choose the display language. Defaults to your system locale.

label: Bands
desc: Band-power snapshots

label: Devices
desc: Device scanner & session lifecycle

label: Chat Store
desc: Chat SQLite operations (save, migrate, open)

label: Embedder
desc: ZUNA encoder & HNSW inserts

label: Filter
desc: GPU filter hops

label: History
desc: Session list loading & CSV scan

label: Hooks
desc: Hook matcher, triggers & notifications

label: Iroh Networking
desc: Relay, QUIC, IPv6 warnings (daemon — very noisy)

label: Scanner
desc: Multi-transport device discovery (BLE, USB, Cortex)

label: Tools
desc: Tool-call execution (invocation, safety, timing)

label: WebSocket
desc: WS connections & messages

label: OpenBCI
desc: Configure an OpenBCI board to connect alongside or instead of another BCI device.

label: Bluetooth LE
desc: Muse, MW75, Hermes, Ganglion, IDUN, Mendi

label: Emotiv Cortex
desc: EPOC, Insight, Flex, MN8 via local Launcher

label: USB Serial
desc: OpenBCI Cyton / CytonDaisy dongle

label: Bind address
desc: LAN mode exposes the API to all devices on your network. Restart required.

label: Default
desc: Standard 8-hour cycle — 23:00 to 07:00.

label: Early Bird
desc: Rise-with-the-sun schedule — 21:30 to 05:30 (8 h).

label: Long Sleeper
desc: Extended 10-hour window — 22:00 to 08:00.

label: Night Owl
desc: Late-to-bed schedule — 01:00 to 09:00 (8 h).

label: Short Sleeper
desc: Compact 6-hour window — 00:00 to 06:00.

label: Admin
desc: Full access — all endpoints

label: Read Only
desc: GET endpoints only

label: Stream
desc: EEG events, status, bands only

label: Default Token
desc: Built-in admin token used by the app. Cannot be deleted. Refresh to generate a new one — the app will pick it up automatically.

label: Check automatically
desc: Check for updates once a day when the app starts.

label: Launch at Login
desc: Start automatically when you log in to your computer.

label: Check frequency
desc: How often the app automatically checks for updates in the background.
